name: ruby-google-cloud-core
title: ruby-google-cloud-core
description:
Internal shared library for google-cloud-ruby
This google-cloud-core library contains shared types, such as error classes,
for the google-cloud project. google-cloud-core is the internal shared library
for google-cloud-ruby.
.
Google provides official support for Ruby versions that are actively supported
by Ruby Core.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-google-cloud-core because Internal shared library for google-cloud-ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-google-cloud-core as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-google-cloud-core with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-google-cloud-core --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
